Dialog.name: SYS_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The downloadable content {f 0 1 2}Episode Aigis -The Answer-{f 0 1 27} is now available. To play, select "Change Episode" from the title screen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}To play the new episode, please purchase the P3R Expansion Pass.[n]{f 1 1}
